registration.title: Registration
registration.target_languages_by_a_comma: Target languages, separated by commas. Example: English, French, Romanian
registration.login_step_longread:
Now let's create an account for the bot.

Password: You can keep the generated one; you can request it later to copy it. Each login will require confirmation. Similar to Telegram, login codes will be sent directly to your Discord/Telegram account. If you lose access to your Discord/Telegram account, you can use this password to log in.

Anonymity: The system will not disclose your personal information (username, Discord/Telegram avatar, ID) to other users (for example, when searching for existing translations in the database).
registration.anon_disclaimer: Leave this field unchecked if you don't want to share your information with other users.
registration.want_connect: Did you want connect another accounts from Discord/Telegram right now?

preferences.notice: You always can change these settings later

main_menu.description: You're now learning $count_languages languages, it's about $count_word words, learned by helping this bot. $count_dbt_words words should be reminded today, to get started press the "Spawn" button.

language_switch.title: Select the language you want to interact with now

alpha_test.thanks: Thanks for contributing to the alpha program!

base_interaction.error_detection_languages: Parameter error during bulk word upload. The requested words were detected as different languages.
